title: gymnadenia conopsea var. montana
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea var. montana, also known as the Mountain Fragrant Orchid, is a variant of the Gymnadenia conopsea species, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The Mountain Fragrant Orchid is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
